import { Meta } from '@storybook/blocks';

<Meta title="Tokens/Colors/Theming Reference" />

# Theming Reference

A reference of every component in the YaleSites design system that supports color theming. These controls allow you to customize the visual appearance of components while maintaining accessibility standards.

## What are Color Slots?

Color slots (also called "dials" or "themes") are predefined color combinations that have been tested for accessibility. Each slot includes coordinated colors for backgrounds, text, borders, and accents that work together harmoniously. Slots map to the active global theme, so components automatically adapt when the global theme changes — a component set to "dial two" will always pull Slot 2 colors from whatever palette is active.
